creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
From the latest Nvidia (Mellanox owner) report :
"NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) today reported revenue for the second quarter ended July 28, 2024, of $30.0 billion,"

I have no connection to this company, so why should I spend my free time working for them ?

The support of ConnectX-3 is not broken: It is EoL hardware and it was the original author (Nvidia) to remove any support of it. So I’ve updated the ticket title.
